bridge_equation_v41.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v41 = mix(B_plastic_v40, L_sys_field_solid, 1 - P_sys_field_solid, D_feature_v35, 1 - G_brain_v35)
bridge_equation_v41.structure_term: B_struct_v41 = mix(B_struct_v40, S_sys_field_solid, R_sys_field_solid, 1 - P_sys_field_solid, D_structure_v35)
bridge_equation_v41.readiness_term: R_train_v41 = mix(R_train_v40, B_plastic_v41, B_struct_v41, R_sys_field_solid, D_align_v35, 1 - P_sys_field_solid)

project_readout.summary: training bridge v41 checks whether systemic low-risk field solidification begins to reduce rule-layer risk in a more solidified and field-like way.
project_readout.next_question: next verify whether this solidified low-risk field still survives after it is folded into the next closed-form core.
